configurations.name: expo-start
runtimeArgs: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && source "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20 && npx expo start --clear --port 8082

configurations.name: expo-android
runtimeArgs: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && source "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20 && npx expo run:android

configurations.name: expo-web
runtimeArgs: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && source "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use 20 && npx expo start --web
